name: track
description: Use the track CLI to create, record, search, rename, and maintain linked Markdown notes in a TRACK_VAULT vault.

interface.shortDescription: Manage linked Markdown notes with track
interface.longDescription: Use the track CLI to create, record, search, rename, and maintain notes, journals, Zettelkasten items, and linked Markdown in a TRACK_VAULT vault.
defaultPrompt: Use track to create a linked note in my vault.
Use track to search my notes.
Use track to rename a note and update backlinks.
